ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "alpha-2" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the country */,
  "alpha-3" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the country */,
  "country-code" INTEGER /* Country code */,
  "iso_3166-2" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "flag_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag image */,
  "time_zones" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of time zones */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in USD */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub-regions" (
  "sub-region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the sub-region belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the sub-region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the sub-region in square kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sub-region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the sub-region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub-region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_sub-regions" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "sub-region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "sub-region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_codes" (
  "region_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region code */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the code belongs to */,
  "code" INTEGER /* Region code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_codes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub-region_codes" (
  "sub-region_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region code */,
  "sub-region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-region the code belongs to */,
  "code" INTEGER /* Sub-region code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sub-region code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub-region_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last accessed timestamp of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
